bids.reasoning: At t=0.00 there is no time pressure to concede, so I am targeting my maximum-utility bid. The opponent’s only offer is all valueC, which is the lowest utility for me on every issue and gives no evidence of concession yet.

I am targeting a very high utility bid (~0.961) because it is still extremely early at t=0.02 and the opponent has not conceded from their all-valueC opening, which is very poor for me. To avoid simply repeating my prior all-valueA bid while making only a small concession, I am conceding on a low-weight issue and holding firm on the highest-weight issues A, B, and C.

At t=0.04 it is still very early, so I am targeting a very high-utility bid while avoiding an exact repeat of my previous offer. The opponent has only made a small concession on issueB, and their latest offer is still low for me, so I will concede only on a low-weight issue while holding firm on the most important issues A, B, and C.

At this early stage (t=0.06), I am still targeting a high-utility bid, conceding only one low-weight issue while holding firm on the most important issues A, B, and C. The opponent’s offers remain very low for my utility, but their latest bid moved issueD to valueB, so I will mirror that limited concession on a low-weight issue without making broader concessions yet.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.96 because it is still very early at t=0.08 and there is no need for major concessions yet. The opponent has made only small concessions from all-valueC offers, so they appear to be holding firm; I will concede only a low-weight issue while preserving my most important issues A, B, and C.

At t=0.10 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making modest concessions on my lowest-weight issues. The opponent has mostly held at valueC but recently conceded issueA to valueA, so I will hold firm on my high-importance issues A/B/C and offer valueB on the lower-weight D/E/F to signal movement without giving up too much utility.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.84 because it is still very early (t=0.12), so there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent has mostly offered low-utility bids to me, with limited concessions on issueA and issueD, so I will hold firm on my highest-weight issues A/B/C while conceding further on a lower-weight issue to avoid repeating my last bid.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.88 because it is still early at t=0.14 and the opponent’s offers remain low-value for me, with only small and inconsistent concessions. I will hold firm on my highest-weight issues A, B, and C while conceding on the lower-weight issues D, E, and F to improve acceptability without giving up too much.

At t=0.16 it is still early, so I am targeting a high utility bid while making concessions mainly on lower-weight issues. The opponent has mostly offered valueC/valueB, with little meaningful concession toward my high-weight issues, so I will hold issueA/issueB/issueC at valueA and concede more on issueD while keeping a strong overall utility.

I am targeting a utility of about 0.80: holding firm on the high-weight issues A, B, and C while conceding on lower-weight issues D and E, plus a partial concession on F. At t=0.18 it is still early, so I should not move close to the opponent’s latest offer, but their last bid improved substantially for me by giving issueA=valueA and issueC=valueB, suggesting some willingness to concede.

I am targeting a high but not maximal utility around 0.84 because it is still early at t=0.20, so there is no need to make large concessions yet. The opponent has mostly held low-value offers for me, but they have signaled willingness on issueA and most recently issueE, so I keep my high-weight issues strong while conceding lower-weight issueD and issueF.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.84 because it is still early at t=0.22, so there is no need to make deep concessions yet. The opponent has mostly offered low-utility bids to me, with only occasional movement on issueA/issueB/issueC, so I will hold firm on my highest-weight issues while conceding more on lower-weight issues D/E/F.

At t=0.24 we are still relatively early, so I am targeting a strong utility around 0.80 while making visible concessions on lower-weight issues. The opponent’s offers remain low for me and only modestly concede on B/C/D/F, so I will hold firm on high-weight issues A, B, and C while yielding more on D/E/F to avoid repeating my prior bid.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.80 because the negotiation is only at t=0.26, so it is too early to concede on the high-weight issues A, B, and C. The opponent has begun offering occasional improvements on issueA, issueC, and issueD, but still mostly pushes valueC, so I am conceding mainly on lower-weight issues D/E/F while holding firm on my key issues.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.84 because it is only t=0.28, so I should not concede much on the high-weight issues A, B, and C. The opponent has started offering valueA/valueB on some issues, but their offers to me are still much lower than my prior bids, so I will concede mainly on lower-weight issues D/F/E while holding my core preferences.

I am targeting a utility around 0.84, still holding firm on the highest-weight issues A, B, and C because it is only t=0.30 and there is no need for major concessions yet. The opponent has made some valid concessions on issueB, issueD, and issueF, but remains inconsistent overall, so I am conceding mainly on lower-weight issues while avoiding repeating my exact previous bid.

At t=0.32 I am still targeting a relatively high utility while making a clearer concession on lower-weight issues. The opponent’s offers have improved somewhat but remain far below my recent bids; with no messages to rely on, I am using the bid history and holding firm on high-weight issues A, B, and C while conceding on D, E, and F.

At t=0.34 I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.80, conceding mainly on lower-weight issues while holding issueA, issueB, and issueC at my best values. The opponent’s latest valid offer improved substantially for me by giving issueA=valueA and several valueB concessions, but they still seem to push valueC on some low-weight issues, so I am matching that pressure on issueD and issueF while making a moderate concession on issueE.

I am targeting about 0.80 utility: enough concession for the mid-early stage, but still protecting my highest-weight issues A, B, and C. The opponent’s offers have improved somewhat but remain inconsistent; their recent bids suggest flexibility around B/C/E/F while often keeping D low for me, so I concede mainly on lower-weight D/E/F rather than on core issues.

I am targeting a utility of about 0.82, keeping my high-weight issues A, B, and C at valueA while conceding on lower-weight E and F. At t=0.38 there is some time pressure but not enough to drop major issues; the opponent has shown occasional willingness to offer valueA on issueD and issueC, so I use issueD:valueA while making concessions on the lowest-weight issues.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.80, keeping valueA on the high-weight issues A/B/C while conceding mainly on lower-weight issues. At t=0.40 there is moderate time pressure, and the opponent has shown some concessions but remains inconsistent, so I will make a meaningful but not late-stage concession. No opponent messages were provided, so I rely only on the valid offer history.

At t=0.42 I am still targeting a high-utility bid, but with meaningful concessions on lower-weight issues rather than giving up my strongest issues A, B, and C. The opponent’s offers have occasionally conceded issueA or issueB/valueA and recently offered issueB:valueA plus mid-values on D/E/F, so I am holding the top three issues at valueA while offering valueB on the lower-weight issues as a plausible mid-game compromise.

I am targeting a still-high utility bid around 0.84, conceding mainly on the lower-weight issues E and F while holding firm on the high-importance issues A, B, and C. At t=0.44 we are in the mid-game, so some movement is appropriate, but the opponent’s offers are only partially conceding and their latest bid gives me about 0.645, so I should not fall that far yet. Their recent offers show willingness to give valueA on issueC and issueD, so I preserve those favorable terms and trade away lower-weight issues.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.76 while making a meaningful mid-game concession as we approach the halfway point. The opponent’s latest valid offer concedes issueB and issueF to valueA and issueC to valueB, while repeatedly pressing for valueC on lower-weight issues, so I keep valueA on the most important issueA and issueB while conceding issueC to valueB and issueD/issueE to valueC.

I am targeting a still-strong midgame utility around 0.84, conceding mainly on lower-weight issues D/E/F while holding firm on high-weight issueB and the recently offered issueA/issueC valueA. The opponent’s last bid gave me valueA on issueA and issueC plus valueB on D/E, so I am incorporating those signals but improving issueB to protect my utility.

At t=0.50 I am targeting a strong mid-game utility around 0.84 while making visible concessions on lower-weight issues rather than sacrificing issueA/issueB/issueC. The opponent’s recent offers have shown willingness to give issueC=valueA and sometimes issueA=valueA/issueB=valueA, while they often keep issueD and issueE at valueC, so I concede there and avoid repeating my last exact bid.

I am targeting a mid-game utility around 0.80, conceding on lower-weight issues and one medium-weight issue while holding firm on high-priority issueA and issueB. The opponent’s recent offers increasingly include valueA/valueB on issueB, issueC, and lower-weight issues, with no messages to modify that signal, so this bid mirrors much of their latest structure while protecting my strongest priorities.

I am targeting a strong mid-game utility around 0.844, keeping my highest-weight issues A and B at valueA while conceding issueC to valueB as the opponent has recently offered it. At t=0.54 there is some time pressure, so I am improving on the opponent’s latest offer mainly on lower-weight issues D and F rather than demanding all valueA; their latest bid was already relatively favorable to me, suggesting room for a workable compromise.

I targeted about 0.80 utility, conceding on lower-weight issues while still holding firm on the most important issues A and B. At t=0.56 we are in the mid-game, so some additional concession is appropriate, but the opponent’s offers are still mixed and not consistently close to my preferred outcomes. Their latest bid gives me value on issueB, issueE, and issueF, so I preserve those signals while compromising on issueC and issueD.

I targeted a strong mid-game utility around 0.84, since at t=0.58 there is some time pressure but not enough to accept the opponent’s latest 0.64-utility offer. The opponent has recently signaled willingness to give valueA on issueA and issueF and valueB on issueC/issueD, so I keep those while asking for valueA on my important issueB and only a moderate concession on low-weight issueE.

I am targeting a utility around 0.80: enough concession for the mid-game at t=0.60 while still protecting my highest-weight issues issueA and issueB at valueA and keeping issueC at a moderate valueB. The opponent’s offers have become more mixed and sometimes include valueA on important issues, but they still often push valueC on issueA/issueC, so I concede mainly on low-weight issueD while not repeating my previous exact bid.

I targeted a utility around 0.80, keeping my highest-weight issues A and B at valueA while conceding on lower/mid-weight issues that the opponent has repeatedly signaled flexibility on. At t=0.62 there is meaningful time pressure, so I moved toward their latest bid by matching issueC=valueB, issueE=valueC, and issueF=valueA, while avoiding a repeat of my previous exact offer. With no messages, I relied only on the valid offer history and ignored no-domain concerns since all recent offers use valid issues and values.

I am targeting a strong but more compromise-oriented utility around 0.84, since we are past the midpoint but not yet at the deadline. The opponent’s recent offers have consistently included concessions like issueF:valueA and several valueB entries, so I will hold firm on high-weight issueA and issueB while conceding moderate/low-weight issues C, D, and E to valueB.

I am targeting a utility of about 0.803, which is a meaningful concession at t=0.66 while still preserving strong value on issueB and issueC. The opponent’s offers have become more generous at times but remain inconsistent; their latest bid presses for issueA:valueC and issueF:valueC, so I concede partially on issueA and fully on low-weight issueF while holding high-value outcomes elsewhere.

I targeted a utility around 0.73, conceding from my prior position because we are past the midpoint but still not at the deadline. The opponent’s latest valid offer keeps issueB and issueE favorable to me while asking concessions on issueA, issueC, issueD, and issueF, so I preserve issueB and issueE, compromise on issueA/issueC, and concede some lower-weight issues.

I am targeting a utility of about 0.64, which is a meaningful concession at t=0.70 while still above reservation value. The opponent’s latest offer gives ground on issueA and issueC but still pressures issueB, so I hold issueB at my top value and compensate by conceding the lower-weight issues D, E, and F to valueC.
